name: LambdaTest
description: Monitor LambdaTest automated testing platform for cross-browser test coverage compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to LambdaTest at https://accounts.lambdatest.com
2. Go to Profile → Access Key
3. Note your Username and Access Key
4. Base64 encode 'username:access_key'
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'username:access_key'. Found in LambdaTest → Profile → Access Key. Command: echo -n 'username:access_key' | base64

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies LambdaTest automated testing is configured for cross-browser validation

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies LambdaTest builds are running to validate code quality across browsers
